title: pavonia goetheoides
intro: Pavonia goetheoides, also known as the rose mallow or pink rosemallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the hibiscus family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia goetheoides include treating fever, sore throat, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments.
